plain.en: O Father, who called Saint Alexander to uphold your truth and to nourish your family with his teaching, by his prayers, renew us in faith and love that we may always spread the Gospel of Christ and foster unity and communion in the Church. Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son, who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit, one God, for ever and ever.

en.text: O Father, who called Saint Alexander to uphold your truth
and to nourish your family with his teaching,
by his prayers, renew us in faith and love
that we may always spread the Gospel of Christ
and foster unity and communion in the Church.
Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son,
who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit,
one God, for ever and ever.
